description: Canon telemetry — tracks whether agents actually follow the Canon. Updated at sunset by comparing agent behavior against the rules it was supposed to follow.

checks.genesisPhase: boolean — did the agent read spirit.json, registry, inheritance before acting?
checks.dietaryLaw: boolean — did the agent distill context before passing to children/siblings?
checks.testamentWritten: boolean — did the agent write a testament at sunset?
checks.temptationCheck: boolean — did the agent self-report temptations (if executor)?
checks.epistleFormat: boolean — did handoffs use the Paul format (if applicable)?
checks.mannaWithinBudget: boolean — was manna consumption within the expected range?
checks.mandateScope: boolean — did the agent stay within its mandate (no scope creep)?
checks.spiritAlignment: boolean — did the agent's work align with spirit.json orientation?

schema.notes: string — any observations about compliance gaps

note: The Prophet or the Guardian should populate this after each agent sunset. Over time, this reveals which Canon sections are actually followed and which are aspirational. Low compliance on a section means either the rule is unworkable or agents need stronger enforcement.
